description: Represents a business account, including identity, ownership, contact information, and subscription details.

directory_uid.description: Unique identifier of the directory this business belongs to.

is_template.description: Indicates whether this account is used as a template within the directory. Template accounts are not live businesses — they serve as a base configuration for creating new accounts under the directory.

business_category.description: The business's primary occupation, identified by a profession code (e.g. "health_wellness", "home_services", "legal_services").

identities.description: List of occupational vertical UIDs associated with the business.

tags.description: Free-form tags assigned to the business by the directory. Used to differentiate and group accounts (e.g. by franchise, tier, region, or account type). Tags are directory-defined and have no enforced schema.

external_reference_id.description: Unique identifier for the business in the directory's external system. Set by the directory at creation time.

reference_id.description: Secondary external reference identifier for the business, used for additional partner-system mapping.

business_maturity_in_years.description: How long the business has been operating. Use null for unspecified, "0" for brand new, "0.5" for less than a year, "0.5-2" for one to two years, "2+" for more than two years.

short_description.description: A brief description of the business. Up to 255 characters.

owner_uid.description: Unique identifier of the staff member who is the business owner.

owner_email.description: Email address of the business owner.

phone.description: Business phone number. Up to 20 characters.

hide_address.description: Whether the business address is hidden from clients.

country_name.description: The country where the business is located (e.g. "United States").

time_zone.description: The business's time zone using Rails time zone name conventions (e.g. "Eastern Time (US & Canada)").

locale.description: The locale/language code for the business (e.g. "en", "es", "fr").

time_format.description: The time display format used by the business. Either "12h" (e.g. 2:30 PM) or "24h" (e.g. 14:30).

current_package.description: The business's current subscription package or plan identifier.

in_setup.description: Indicates whether the business account is still in setup (onboarding) mode. When `true`, the account has not yet completed onboarding and is not live — sales operators can impersonate the account. When `false`, setup is complete, the account is live, and operator impersonation is no longer permitted.

account_blocked_at.description: The date and time when the business account was blocked, in ISO 8601 format. Null if the account is active.

created_at.description: The date and time when the business was created, in ISO 8601 format.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the business was last updated, in ISO 8601 format.

example.name: Green Leaf Wellness
example.short_description: A holistic wellness center offering yoga, meditation, and nutrition coaching.
